        have : (y : ℝ) * f y + (y : ℝ) * f y ≤ 2 := by linarith
        have : π y = y := (h_uniq y y this).symm
        rw [← this, pi_pi] at pi_ne_x
        contradiction
      have : (x : ℝ) * f y + (y : ℝ) * f x > 2 := by
        have : (x : ℝ) * f y > x / y := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ((div_lt_iff' y.2).mpr y_fy_gt_1) x.2
        have : (y : ℝ) * f x > y / x := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ((div_lt_iff' x.2).mpr x_fx_gt_1) y.2
        linarith [le_of_sub_nonneg (show (x : ℝ) / y + y / x - 2 ≥ 0 from by
          field_simp; apply sq_nonneg ((x : ℝ) - y))]
      linarith [hπ x]

    have pi_id : ∀ x, π x = x := by
      intro x
      apply (h_uniq x x).symm
      have : (x : ℝ) * f x ≤ 1 := (le_div_iff' x.2).mp (f_le x)
      linarith

    intro x
    apply le_antisymm (f_le x)
    by_contra H
    push_neg at H
    have f_lt : f x < 1 / x := lt_of_le_of_ne (f_le x) H
    let y : ℝ+ := ⟨1 / f x, one_div_pos.mpr (h_pos x)⟩
    have y_ne_x : y ≠ x := by
      intro h_eq
      rw [← h_eq] at f_lt
      exact (ne_of_lt (show f x < 1 / x from f_lt)) (by rw [← h_eq]; field_simp)
    have P_xy : (x : ℝ) * f y + (y : ℝ) * f x ≤ 2 := by
      have : f y ≤ f x := by
        rw [le_div_iff (h_pos x)]
        convert f_le y using 1
        field_simp
      calc (x : ℝ) * f y + (y : ℝ) * f x 
         ≤ x * f x + y * f x := by apply add_le_add; rfl; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ‹_› (le_of_lt y.2)
       _ = x * f x + 1 := by field_simp
       _ < 1 + 1 := by apply add_lt_add_left; rwa [lt_div_iff' x.2] at f_lt
       _ = 2 := rfl
    have : y = π x := (h_uniq x y P_xy)
    rw [pi_id x] at this
    exact y_ne_x this

  · intro h
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, h]
    constructor
    · intro x; exact one_div_pos.mpr x.2
    · intro x
      use x
      constructor
      · field_simp; linarith
      · intro y hy
        simp only at hy
        have : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x ≤ 2 := by
          convert hy using 1; field_simp; ring
        have : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x ≥ 2 := by
          field_simp; apply sq_nonneg ((x : ℝ) - y)
        have eq2 : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x = 2 := le_antisymm ‹_› ‹_›
        field_simp at eq2
        have : ((x : ℝ) - y)^2 = 0 := by linear_combination -1 * eq2 * (y * x)
        ext; exact sub_eq_zero.mp (pow_eq_zero this)

rw [answer]
  ext f
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨hf_pos, hf⟩
    have h_uniq : ∀ x, ∃! y, (x : ℝ) * f y + (y : ℝ) * f x ≤ 2 := hf
    choose y hy using h_uniq
    have P : ∀ x z, (x : ℝ) * f z + (z : ℝ) * f x ≤ 2 ↔ z = y x := 
      fun x z ↦ (hy x).unique_iff.symm
    have y_symm : ∀ x, y (y x) = x := fun x ↦ 
      (P (y x) x).mp (by rw [add_comm]; exact (hy x).1)
    have y_eq_x : ∀ x, y x = x := by
      intro x
      by_contra h
      have hx : f x > 1 / x := by
        have : ¬ ((x : ℝ) * f x + (x : ℝ) * f x ≤ 2) := mt (P x x).mpr h
        simp at this; rw [← mul_lt_mul_left (x.2 : 0 < (x:ℝ))]; field_simp [this]; linarith
      let z := y x
      have hz : f z > 1 / z := by
        have : z ≠ y z := by rw [y_symm]; exact h.symm
        have : ¬ ((z : ℝ) * f z + (z : ℝ) * f z ≤ 2) := mt (P z z).mpr this
        simp at this; rw [← mul_lt_mul_left (z.2 : 0 < (z:ℝ))]; field_simp [this]; linarith
      have : (x : ℝ) / z + z / x < (x : ℝ) * f z + z * f x := by
        gcongr; exacts [hz, hx]
      have : (x : ℝ) * f z + z * f x ≤ 2 := (hy x).1
      have : (x : ℝ) / z + z / x < 2 := by linarith
      have am_gm : (x : ℝ) / z + z / x > 2 := by
        rw [gt_iff_lt, ← sub_pos]; field_simp; rw [← sq]; positivity
      linarith
    have f_eq : ∀ x, f x = 1 / x := by
      intro x
      have ub : f x ≤ 1 / x := by
        have : (x : ℝ) * f x + (x : ℝ) * f x ≤ 2 := by rw [← y_eq_x]; exact (hy x).1
        field_simp at this ⊢; linarith
      by_contra ne
      have lb : f x < 1 / x := lt_of_le_of_ne ub ne
      let z : ℝ+ := ⟨1 / f x, one_div_pos.mpr (hf_pos x)⟩
      have znx : z ≠ x := by
        intro c; rw [← c] at lb; simp at lb
      have : (x : ℝ) * f z + z * f x > 2 := by
        rw [P, y_eq_x]; exact znx
      have : f z ≤ 1 / z := ub z
      have : (x : ℝ) * (1 / z) + z * f x > 2 := by
        calc 2 < (x : ℝ) * f z + z * f x := this
             _ ≤ (x : ℝ) * (1 / z) + z * f x := by gcongr
      simp at this; rw [div_one_div_cancel (hf_pos x)] at this
      have : (x : ℝ) * f x + (1 / f x) * f x > 2 := this
      field_simp at this
      have : (x : ℝ) * f x + 1 > 2 := this
      have : (x : ℝ) * f x > 1 := by linarith
      have : f x > 1 / x := (div_lt_iff x.2).mpr this
      linarith
    funext; apply f_eq
  · rintro rfl
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, one_div]
    refine ⟨fun x ↦ inv_pos.mpr x.2, fun x ↦ ⟨x, ?_, fun y hy ↦ ?_⟩⟩
    · field_simp; linarith
    · field_simp at hy
      have : (x : ℝ) / y + y / x ≤ 2 := hy
      have : (x : ℝ)^2 + y^2 ≤ 2 * x * y := by
        rw [div_add_div _ _ y.2 x.2, div_le_iff (mul_pos y.2 x.2)] at this; linarith
      have : ((x : ℝ) - y)^2 ≤ 0 := by nlinarith
      exact Subtype.eq (eq_of_sub_eq_zero (pow_eq_zero (le_antisymm this (sq_nonneg _))))
